{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Northstrider's Remnant
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Northstrider's Remnant]] is a crimson humanoid monstrosity with twisting serpentine [[dragons]] for limbs.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
